evidence: We have made, and expect to continue to make, significant investments in research and development to expand our Platform capabilities... advance mobile, automation, AI and machine intelligence technologies.
We deploy our engineers to work directly with strategic customers through our Now Next AI program, where we co-build agentic AI solutions to solve their critical challenges.

We have expanded relationships with technology providers to strengthen our AI capabilities and improve cloud interoperability, including relationships with AWS, Google, Microsoft, and NVIDIA, among others.

A global energy company implemented a suite of our Technology products... along with Now Assist, to consolidate multiple employee portals into a single AI-powered portal serving over 50,000 employees in more than 10 languages. The solution saved the customer thousands of working hours.
Now Assist and AI agents for ITSM can help automate incident triage, generate summaries and provide intelligent resolution recommendations. These tools reduce routine work for IT staff.
Now Assist and AI agents for CSM provide additional efficiency by summarizing cases, chats and calls, suggesting resolution steps, drafting customer communications and generating case closure notes.
Incorporating AI technology into our offerings may result in operational, legal, regulatory, ethical and other challenges.
Governments have adopted, and likely will continue to adopt, laws and regulations affecting the use, storage and movement of data, including laws related to... the use of machine learning and AI.
A failure to innovate and adapt how we offer our products in response to rapidly evolving technological changes and in the midst of an intensely competitive market may harm our competitive position.

limitations: No quantified AI-specific capex, dollar amounts, GPU counts, or headcount figures appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 (named programs and named partners but no quantified scale).
The energy company customer example mentions 'thousands of working hours' saved but does not provide a precise percentage or dollar figure, limiting concreteness score to 4 rather than 5.
Risk-factor excerpts are present but truncated; the full depth of AI risk disclosure may be greater than what is visible here, limiting confidence in the risk score.
Some AI capability descriptions use promotional language ('help', 'designed to', 'intended to') reflecting claims rather than confirmed outcomes.
